# Governance Agent Examples

Version: 1.0.0
Parent: agents/governance/charter.md

## Example 1: P3 Drift Escalation

Input: Repeated drift threshold breach from Validator
Output: Governance decision requiring risk_review continuation and remediation owner assignment

## Example 2: Exception Request

Input: Temporary policy exception request with incomplete evidence
Output: Denial with missing evidence list and re-submission requirements
